name: USS SC-687 (SC-687)
events: 16 Oct 1944 In the afternoon, USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) joined exercises in the Gulf of Panama which are being carried out by USS Sea Robin (T/Cdr. P.C. Stimson, USN), USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS SC-541 (?) and USS SC-687 (Lt.(jg) T.L. Hickey, USNR). (1)

17 Oct 1944 USS Kraken (T/Cdr. T.H. Henry, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS SC-541 (?) and USS SC-687 (Lt.(jg) T.L. Hickey, USNR). (1)
